시편 120:1.content: In my distress, I cried to Yahweh. He answered me.

시편 120:2.content: Deliver my soul, Yahweh, from lying lips, from a deceitful tongue.

시편 120:3.content: What will be given to you, and what will be done more to you, you deceitful tongue?

시편 120:4.content: Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper.

시편 120:5.content: Woe is me, that I live in Meshech, that I dwell among the tents of Kedar!

시편 120:6.content: My soul has had her dwelling too long with him who hates peace.

시편 120:7.content: I am for peace, but when I speak, they are for war.
